load_bearing_invariant.rule: SR #4 0.50 confidence sub-floor (immutable from Brain canon)
load_bearing_invariant.behaviour: Whenever cascade model confidence < 0.50, the response carries fano_status=draft_fact with quarantine_reason='Sub-floor model confidence (X.XX)' regardless of L3 firewall verdict
load_bearing_invariant.implication_for_consumer: These rows are 'I don't know with confidence' rows, not 'model says wrong' rows. Surface them for operator review with the model's tentative best-guess + confidence.
